Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
G. Ryan Patrick, Esq.(415-552-8230) for Plaintiff/Moving party Carly McCarty.
Jennifer Zarich, Esq.(415-978-9999) for Defendant/opposing party Nelly Muganda.

Party reports Deposition has taken place. The Court announces it has adopted the recommendation of the Judge Pro Tem; the only issue is Sanctions. Defendant Argues and concurs with the Tentative ruling on the first motion. Defendant argues denial of sanctions on the second motion. Plaintiff argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Carly Mccarty'S Motion To Compel Defendants Appearance At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, assuming the depositions have taken place on March 2, 2016 and March 4, 2016. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,000 against Defendant's counsel. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
